data.description:
The eval substrate, behind an optional extra.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Inspect AI (>=0.3.221) behind rebar[eval]; datasets + thresholds git-tracked beside the prompt (<id>.eval.yaml).
- [ ] `rebar prompt eval` reads the dirty working tree; commit required to apply/sign.
Files: src/rebar/llm/eval.py, pyproject.toml
data.title: WS-G1: Inspect AI eval seam + git-tracked datasets/thresholds + [eval] extra
